calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Robert Balian.
Appearances: Saul Ferster, Esq. represented the Plaintiff, Oak Lily Apartments, LLC. present by Steward Fuss.
Defendants, Donald Fileds, Timothy Fields and Larry Fields are in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation and/or judgment.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendants to surrender the possession of the premises of the property located at: 360 Lily street #3, San Francisco by 5:00 PM. on June 15, 2003 and all keys and garage door openers to plaintiff's agent. Leaving the premises empty of all personal property.
Plaintiff shall pay a total of $9,000.00 to the defendants as follows: $2,000.00 to Donald Fields, $3,500.00 to Timothy Fields and $3,500.00 to Larry Fields. The total of $9,000.00 deemed to include full return of the defendant's security deposit.
If defendants comply with the agreement, plaintiff shall waive all rent and damages of the premises from 4-03 to 6-15-03 and dismiss with prejudice. Each side to bear its own costs and attorney's fees. If defendants fail to comply, upon 24 hours notice to defendants plaintiff may apply ex parte for a judgment to be entered for immediate possession of the premises, damages and costs. Defendants are not entitled to any stay of execution of any judgment entered. Each party waives claim against the other. All parties agreed and signed in
open court. Matter is settled and trial date is vacated.
